# Deep Nesting Fixture

Exercises the §8.2 nesting multiplier with lists, blockquotes, and callouts
interleaved.

> Outer blockquote context.
>
> - outer list item
>   - inner list item
>     - deepest list item
>
> > Deeper blockquote.
> >
> > - nested list inside a deeper quote
> >   - and even deeper

## Callout Chain

> [!NOTE]
> Callout with nested list:
>
> - item one
>   - subitem
> - item two

End of fixture.
